label: KarooFireFly
description: Automatic ANT+ smart bike light control based on time of day and ambient light. Tested with Magene L508 and Garmin Varia RTL 515/516. Controls lights already paired through Karoo's native sensor settings — no separate pairing needed. Features manual front/rear light assignment, time-based (sunrise/sunset) and ambient light sensor modes, configurable light profiles per zone (day/night), zone change notifications with sound, and manual override via BonusActions.
releaseNotes:
* Manual front/rear light assignment — supports multiple lights
* Auto-discovery of paired ANT+ lights with manufacturer info
* Tested with Garmin Varia RTL 515/516
* Fixed bug where only one light was controlled
